definition: Complete position sizing, stop loss, take profit, and trade management rules aligned with ICT methodology and FTMO compliance.

position_sizing.rule: Risk fixed percentage per trade, adjusted by grade. NEVER fixed dollar amount.

ftmo_rules.position_limit: Max 3, reduced to 2 if correlated (via SMT_pairs)
ftmo_rules.kill_switch: Bridge auto-halts at 2% daily drawdown to protect FTMO limits

stop_loss.placement: Beyond the manipulation extreme (liquidity_sweep wick from step 5). Min 1.5x ATR from entry.
stop_loss.connection: SL is anchored to the liquidity_sweep event. If the sweep extreme is revisited, your thesis (that it was manipulation) is WRONG.
stop_loss.swing_trades: SL beyond HTF OB/FVG zone, not just LTF entry zone.
stop_loss.common_error: SL at exact OB/FVG edge — institutions will sweep 5-10 pips beyond. Add buffer.

take_profit.tp1: draw_on_liquidity — nearest external liquidity. Partial close 50% here.
take_profit.tp2: Next liquidity pool beyond TP1. Trail remaining 50%.
take_profit.connection: TP targets ARE the liquidity levels from draw_on_liquidity. This is why mapping liquidity is essential — it defines your exit.

minimum_rr_filter.intraday: TP1 must be >= 2R from entry, otherwise SKIP
minimum_rr_filter.swing: TP1 must be >= 1.5R from entry (wider SL = needs less R)

tp1_hit.sl_adjustment: Move SL to breakeven (entry price ± spread)

after_2R.action: If price reaches 2R without hitting TP2, close 25% more (75% total closed)

tp2_hit.note: For swing trades, may hold 25% for TP3 (weekly DOL)

trailing_stop_rules.method: Structure-based trailing — NOT fixed pip/point trail
trailing_stop_rules.structure_method: Trail behind the most recent confirmed swing point (LTF for intraday, HTF for swing)
trailing_stop_rules.never_widen: Trailing SL only moves in favor — NEVER move SL back against direction
trailing_stop_rules.time_based: If position is +1R but stalling for 2+ hours during killzone, consider manual close

trade_management.breakeven: After TP1 or 1R profit → move SL to breakeven.
trade_management.trailing: After breakeven → trail 0.5R behind each new structure point.
trade_management.loss_rule: 2 consecutive losses → pause 1 hour. 3 → stop for day.

session_rules.london_close: Close intraday positions by London close unless strongly trending
session_rules.overnight_hold: Only swing trades (4H+ timeframe) held overnight
session_rules.friday_rule: Reduce position size by 50% on Fridays. Close all intraday by 3 PM ET.

bridge_integration.partial_close_pct: Default 0.5 (50% at TP1). Configurable per trade in TradeDecision.
bridge_integration.trailing_sl_field: PaperPosition.trailing_sl updated by position_manager on each price check
